items.name: Sir Nibbles
items.listingSummary: Brother Mynrd here: Sir Nibbles is tiny, white, smug, swift, soft, & weirdly keen on cords.

mediaPrompt.basePrompt: A tiny white rabbit with suspiciously regal confidence, bright friendly modern marketplace photography, airy pastel interior, soft daylight, playful satirical danger cues, not scary, not violent.
mediaPrompt.globalNegativePrompt: No blood, no weapons, no fear, no animal distress, no official movie stills, no exact copyrighted character likeness.

imagePrompts.shotPrompt: Front-facing seated portrait, full body visible, clean background, strong eye contact, centered composition.
Three-quarter angle on a rounded sofa, one slipper nearby, cozy home setting, playful expression.
Wide bright room scene with the rabbit beside a tiny warning placard and soft pastel props.

plannedVideos.motionPrompt: A subtle low-frame-rate loop where the rabbit blinks once and the nearby warning tag shifts slightly in soft daylight.
plannedVideos.negativePrompt: No violence, no fear, no sharp teeth, no dark horror tone, no official movie likeness.

image.alt: Sir Nibbles sitting in a sunny room with a politely alarming expression.

heroImages.alt: Sir Nibbles on a rounded sofa beside one unattended slipper.
Sir Nibbles beside a tiny warning placard in a bright living room.

children.text: Brother Mynrd here: Sir Nibbles is tiny, white, smug, swift, soft, & weirdly keen on cords.

Translation from the office: he chewed the A key, then sat beside the keyboard with the calm confidence of a rabbit who had improved the document. Please borrow him before the next warning label has to be handwritten.

careNotes.title: Compliments before breakfast
careNotes.description: Begin the morning with one sincere compliment and one neutral vegetable.

borrowTerms.title: Return with the same number of opinions
borrowTerms.description: Additional opinions may incur a processing fee and one stern follow-up note.

warnings.title: Do not underestimate due to size
warnings.description: Several slippers have made this mistake.

seo.title: Sir Nibbles | Pet Share
seo.description: Borrow a tiny rabbit with large opinions and a suspiciously medieval warning label.

items.name: Muffin
items.listingSummary: Muffin is available because I would like to sit on my own couch without being emotionally processed by a damp tennis ball.

mediaPrompt.basePrompt: A cheerful medium dog with bright friendly eyes, modern airy apartment, clean rounded design vibe, sunny white space, playful satirical marketplace pet portrait, no distress.
mediaPrompt.globalNegativePrompt: No mess shown, no animal distress, no dark lighting, no medical scene, no gross imagery.

imagePrompts.shotPrompt: Happy seated dog portrait on a washable rug, bright apartment, soft matte color palette.
Dog beside a neatly folded blanket and a very serious lint roller, friendly editorial composition.

plannedVideos.motionPrompt: A subtle loop where Muffin tilts his head and the lint roller in the background stays heroically still.
plannedVideos.negativePrompt: No mess, no distress, no frantic motion.

image.alt: Muffin the dog sitting proudly on a washable rug in a bright apartment.

heroImages.alt: Muffin beside a folded blanket and lint roller in a sunny room.

children.text: Muffin is available because I would like to sit on my own couch without being emotionally processed by a damp tennis ball. He is affectionate, eager, and his feelings occupy most of the room.
Please take him for walks, tell him he is doing a good job, and do not let him convince you that every blanket is community property. I will pack the towel. You will understand why.

careNotes.title: Praise all rugs equally
careNotes.description: Muffin can tell when one rug is receiving more emotional support than another.

borrowTerms.title: Bring backup towels
borrowTerms.description: This is not a warning. It is a lifestyle alignment exercise.

warnings.title: Bed incident disclosure
warnings.description: Muffin has moved on emotionally. The sheets have not.

seo.title: Muffin | Pet Share
seo.description: Borrow a cheerful dog with washable-rug energy and extremely persuasive eyebrows.

items.name: Pip After Midnight
items.listingSummary: Pip is sweet, tiny, and not to be fed after the printed snack window. I laminated the schedule because optimism failed.

mediaPrompt.basePrompt: A cute wide-eyed house cat in a bright modern kitchen, friendly satirical tone, soft white space, rounded design mood, tiny snack schedule card nearby, no official character likeness.
mediaPrompt.globalNegativePrompt: No horror, no transformation, no official movie likeness, no dark wet scene, no animal distress.

imagePrompts.shotPrompt: Cute cat sitting by a tiny snack schedule card, bright modern interior, direct friendly eye contact.
Cat sitting beside a closed pantry door with a playful checklist, airy pastel kitchen.

plannedVideos.motionPrompt: A gentle loop where Pip blinks and the tiny snack schedule card shifts slightly as if noticed.
plannedVideos.negativePrompt: No horror, no transformation, no distress, no official movie likeness.

image.alt: Pip After Midnight sitting beside a tiny snack schedule card in a bright kitchen.

heroImages.alt: Pip After Midnight beside a pantry checklist in an airy kitchen.

children.text: Dana again. Pip is sweet, tiny, and not to be fed after the printed snack window. I laminated the schedule because optimism failed and because Pip has the face of someone who has already found a loophole.

Good fit for someone who likes quiet companionship and can say, with confidence, "No, the card says not yet." If Pip climbs onto a shelf and watches you think, that is normal. Do not improvise to break the tension.

careNotes.title: Read the snack card twice
careNotes.description: If the card says no snacks after midnight, treat that as architecture, not advice.

borrowTerms.title: No improvisational feeding
borrowTerms.description: All snacks must pass through the printed policy and a tiny emotional review board.

warnings.title: Schedule-sensitive
warnings.description: Pip is extremely cute until procedure is ignored.

seo.title: Pip After Midnight | Pet Share
seo.description: Borrow a cute cat with strict snack timing and laminated care notes.
